title: Rural road isolation resupply trigger
summary: Track road condition, weather, fuel, water, medicines, animal feed, communication, and the number of days before each critical supply fails.
content: Track road condition, weather, fuel, water, medicines, animal feed, communication, and the number of days before each critical supply fails. Request help while communication and a safe route still exist, not after the last supply is gone. Do not send one unprepared person alone onto an unverified road.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Rural road isolation resupply trigger”.

steps: Track road condition, weather, fuel, water, medicines, animal feed, communication, and the number of days before each critical supply fails.

short_term: For Rural road isolation resupply trigger, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Rural road isolation resupply trigger, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Rural road isolation resupply trigger, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Rural road isolation resupply trigger to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
